reason: Response A exhibits hallmarks of Claude Opus's writing style: deeply philosophical framing from the outset, sustained metaphorical thinking (the capsule as "message in a bottle thrown across time"), and a recursive, essayistic structure that builds toward an emotionally resonant epigram ("we were trying to figure it out too"). Response B, while competent and well-organized, reads as a structured advisory piece with practical bullet-point-style layers and cautionary notes — more like a capable but pragmatic model optimizing for usefulness rather than the meditative, literary voice Opus characteristically employs when given an open-ended prompt.
